    * Diabetes mellitus without mention of complication, type II or unspecified type.
    * Unspecified essential hypertension.
    * Osteoporosis.
    * Unspecified hereditary and idiopathic peripheral neuropathy.
    * Personal history of malignant neoplasm of kidney.
